10k_mda_excerpts.text: 2026 CapEx: $4.3 billion total, including $3.0 billion for major mining projects. Bagdad (AZ) expansion: new concentrating facilities, 200-250 million lbs/year additional copper production, estimated $3.5B capital, investment decision targeted H2 2026.
El Abra (Chile): Environmental impact statement submitted March 2026 for major mill facility. Potential 700+ million lbs/year copper production. Economics supported below $4.00/lb copper.
Operational excellence — carefully managing costs and near-term capital expenditures during phased ramp-up.
10k_mda_excerpts.source: FCX Q4 2025 / Full Year Earnings Release — FCX_260122.pdf
